highlight: Building product and infrastructure for professionals navigating commodities markets. Shipped enterprise features, 2FA, and RBAC; led discovery through to production.
Drove ML and tooling for the claims pipeline. Shipped internal tools that automated manual steps and scaled claim volume by an order of magnitude; cut intervention by 85%.
Led product and growth strategy across a 3-year stretch. Owned roadmap, prioritization, and the link between what we built and what we measured.
